prompt: Add ClickHouse analytics queries for dashboard metrics

turns.content:
<task>
Add ClickHouse integration for querying dashboard analytics metrics.
</task>

1. clickhouse-driver - https://clickhouse-driver.readthedocs.io/en/latest/
   pip install clickhouse-driver. Client(host, port, database). client.execute(query, params).

arguments.title: ClickHouse Python driver
arguments.content:
pip install clickhouse-driver
from clickhouse_driver import Client
client = Client(host='localhost', port=9000, database='analytics')
result = client.execute('SELECT count() FROM events WHERE date = %(date)s', {'date': '2024-01-01'})
Returns list of tuples. For dicts: client.execute(query, with_column_types=True) then zip columns with rows.

arguments.message: ClickHouse analytics service created with two query methods: daily_active_users (DAU over date range) and top_events (most common events in last N days). Set CLICKHOUSE_HOST and CLICKHOUSE_DB env vars.

arguments.summary: Created ClickHouse analytics service with parameterized queries for DAU and top events metrics.
arguments.final_answer: ClickHouse analytics service added with daily_active_users and top_events queries. Uses parameterized queries for safety. Set CLICKHOUSE_HOST/CLICKHOUSE_DB env vars.
